archetype.name: Bastion
archetype.note: This archetype offers Quick Shield Block at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Viking
archetype.note: This archetype offers Quick Shield Block at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Quick Shield Block
feat.text: You can bring your shield into place with hardly a thought. At the start of each of your turns, you gain an additional reaction that you can use only to Shield Block.

traits.name: Champion
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the champion class.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
